commandsRun.command: xcodebuild clean build -project TacNet.xcodeproj -scheme TacNet -destination "platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17,OS=latest"
simctl lifecycle sequence (boot/install/launch/screenshot/terminate/shutdown) scripted via python

assertions.title: App launches in Simulator without crashing

steps.action: Boot iPhone 17 simulator and install TacNet.app with simctl
steps.expected: Install succeeds

steps.action: Launch com.tacnet.app with --ui-test-skip-download and wait 15s
steps.expected: App remains alive with rendered UI
steps.observed: Launch succeeded; terminate-after-wait returned exit 0 (process alive after 15s).

steps.action: Capture screenshot at t=5s
steps.expected: Non-blank rendered UI screenshot captured

evidence.consoleErrors: none of required red-flag strings; see test-and-fix/ui-regression/VAL-UI-001-simctl-console-second-run.log and test-and-fix/ui-regression/console-redflag-check.json
evidence.network: N/A (no API network assertions for launch smoke)

assertions.title: Initial screen renders appropriately for bootstrap state

steps.action: Run UI smoke test for bootstrap download gate fixture
steps.expected: Download gate renders with progress/gating copy and no blank state

steps.action: Run UI smoke test with --ui-test-skip-download
steps.expected: Welcome screen renders with affordances

assertions.title: Welcome / onboarding screen renders with Create and Join affordances

steps.action: Open welcome screen in UI smoke
steps.expected: Create and Join buttons visible

steps.action: Tap Create then navigate back and tap Join
steps.expected: Reach Tree Builder then Network Scan without crash

assertions.title: Tree Builder (organiser) — add/rename/remove flow without crash

steps.action: Navigate to Tree Builder from Welcome
steps.expected: Tree Builder renders

steps.action: Add child node Alpha, rename to Bravo, then remove
steps.expected: UI updates after each action without crash
steps.observed: All actions succeeded and UI updated; test passed.

assertions.title: Network Scan screen renders even when no networks are discoverable

steps.action: Navigate Welcome -> Join Network
steps.expected: Network Scan view renders in simulator

steps.action: Observe empty/rescan state
steps.expected: No crash/hang in no-BLE simulator context
steps.observed: Empty state and rescan interaction completed; test passed.

assertions.title: PIN entry screen renders and accepts input

steps.action: Launch UI host route pin-entry
steps.expected: PIN entry view renders

steps.action: Enter 4 digits and submit
steps.expected: Input accepted and submission observed
steps.observed: Submitted value indicator rendered; test passed.

assertions.title: Role Selection screen renders tree hierarchy with claim controls

steps.action: Seed network in UI smoke helper and publish tree
steps.expected: Role selection screen appears

steps.action: Verify seeded node and claim control availability
steps.expected: Seeded hierarchy visible and claim path operable
steps.observed: Alpha node shown; flow progressed to claim step in tab test.

assertions.title: Main tab renders live feed and PTT button responds

steps.action: Reach main tab after seeded claim
steps.expected: Main view and PTT control render
steps.observed: Main root and PTT control found.

steps.action: Press-and-hold PTT control
steps.expected: Interaction completes without freeze/crash
steps.observed: Hold action succeeded; app stayed foreground.

assertions.title: Tree tab renders hierarchy with status indicators

steps.action: Switch to Tree View tab
steps.expected: Tree tab content renders
steps.observed: Tree root rendered with seeded hierarchy.

assertions.title: Data Flow tab renders INCOMING / PROCESSING / OUTGOING sections

steps.action: Switch to Data Flow tab
steps.expected: Data Flow root with all three section headers

assertions.title: Settings tab renders with release-role and organiser-only actions

steps.action: Launch settings host as organiser
steps.expected: Edit Tree + Promote + Release Role visible

steps.action: Launch settings host as participant
steps.expected: Release Role visible; organiser-only controls hidden

assertions.title: Tab navigation switches between all 4 tabs without state loss or crash

steps.action: Cycle Main -> Tree -> Data Flow -> Settings -> repeat
steps.expected: All transitions responsive and stable
steps.observed: Full tab cycle completed without crash; app remained foreground.

assertions.title: No SwiftUI runtime errors or console red-flags during full smoke walk

steps.action: Scan smoke and simctl console logs for required red-flag strings
steps.expected: Zero matches for all red-flag strings
steps.observed: All red-flag counts were zero across checked logs.

evidence.consoleErrors: explicit red-flag check at test-and-fix/ui-regression/console-redflag-check.json (all counts 0 for Fatal error:, Thread 1: EXC_, SIGABRT, Modifying state during view update, AttributeGraph: cycle detected, Unhandled error, Invalid frame dimension)

assertions.title: End-to-end pipeline — clean build, full tests, simulator walkthrough all green

steps.action: Run clean build on iPhone 17 simulator destination
steps.expected: BUILD SUCCEEDED with zero non-allowlisted warnings

steps.action: Run full test suite
steps.expected: 0 failures and >=119 tests
steps.observed: Unit suite executed 121 tests (0 failures) and UI suite executed 10 tests (0 failures) in same run.

steps.action: Run simulator walkthrough evidence (UI smoke + simctl launch/install lifecycle)
steps.expected: Onboarding and tab smoke complete without crash
steps.observed: UI smoke tests passed and simctl launch evidence captured.

frictions.description: A preliminary liveness check using `simctl spawn booted ps -p <pid>` failed with "No such file or directory" in simulator shell.
frictions.resolution: Used a stronger liveness proof: successful `simctl terminate` after 15s wait (exit 0) in second-run sequence.

frictions.description: Pre-launch `simctl terminate com.tacnet.app` returned "found nothing to terminate" when app was not running.
frictions.resolution: Treated as benign precondition and proceeded to install/launch flow.

summary: Validated 14 assigned assertions (VAL-UI-001..013, VAL-REG-002): 14 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Pipeline checks green with BUILD SUCCEEDED, full tests (121 unit + 10 UI) passing, simulator smoke evidence captured, and red-flag console strings absent.
